title: Havells India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Havells India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Havells India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Havells India:
Havells India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Havells India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
